testsuite.name: launchKeylessAppinEmulatorTest
testsuite.system-err:
An error occurred while creating a new GeckoDriver session: [SessionNotCreatedError] Unable to find a matching set of capabilities Verify if GeckoDriver is configured correctly; using: { start_process: true, server_path: undefined, port: 4444, host: 'localhost', ssl: false, default_path_prefix: '', proxy: undefined, cli_args: {} }
Set webdriver.log_path in your Nightwatch config to retrieve more logs from GeckoDriver.

error.message: An error occurred while creating a new GeckoDriver session: [SessionNotCreatedError] Unable to find a matching set of capabilities

ode_modules\selenium-webdriver\lib\error.js:524:15) at parseHttpResponse (C:\Keyless\keyless-appium

testcase.name: Should launch the Keyless app in emulator
